description.value: **Benefit:** Once per day, you can create an unstable mutagen. It is like a normal mutagen in most ways, but also gains a single benefit or hindrance due to its instability. Roll 1d6 to determine the result of the instability. d6 Result 1 The unstable mutagen lasts for 5 minutes per alchemist level. 2 The unstable mutagen lasts for 20 minutes per alchemist level. 3 The unstable mutagen does not grant a natural armor bonus. 4 The natural armor bonus granted by the mutagen increases by 2. 5 The penalty that the mutagen applies to the corresponding mental ability score increases by 2. 6 The unstable mutagen does not apply a penalty to the corresponding mental ability score.
